mapper.select: select count(1) from sys_user_post where post_id=#{postId}
mapper.delete:
delete from sys_user_post where user_id in
#{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT u.user_id AS userId, u.login_name AS loginName, u.user_name AS userName, d.dept_id AS deptId, d.dept_name AS deptName, p.post_id AS postId, p.post_name AS postName FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON u.dept_id = d.dept_id LEFT JOIN sys_user_post up ON u.user_id = up.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_post p ON up.post_id = p.post_id;
